heading: Why trust this solo trip to LA guide
intro: This guide comes from real solo travel experience across Los Angeles — understanding its car-dependent layout, knowing where it rewards solo travelers, and being honest about where it does not.

items.title: Solo-traveler first
items.text: Every recommendation is filtered through solo-traveler questions — how easy it is to get around alone, where you can eat without feeling awkward, and what activities work at solo pace.

items.title: Honest about LA's challenges
items.text: LA is car-dependent and can feel isolating without planning. This guide tells you upfront what to expect and how to make it work, rather than overselling the city.

items.title: Transport reality covered
items.text: Rental car vs. Uber vs. Metro — the honest breakdown of what works, what it costs, and when each option makes sense for a solo traveler in LA.

items.title: Meeting people covered
items.text: LA is not naturally social for visitors. This guide covers the specific venues and activities where solo travelers actually meet other people — not generic advice.

footer: If you are planning your first or next solo trip to Los Angeles, this guide tells you what actually works.
